message:
fix: sync bytecode OpCode enum between compile-time and runtime

Added UAdd and USub opcodes to src/codegen/bytecode.zig to match the
runtime bytecode.zig. This fixes StackUnderflow errors when using
eval() with comptime bytecode compilation.

Fixes test_binop.py and test_unary.py

files.patch:
@@ -15,6 +15,8 @@ pub const OpCode = enum(u8) {
     Mod,
     Pow,
     Invert, // Bitwise NOT ~
+    UAdd, // Unary + (type check only)
+    USub, // Unary - (negate)
     Eq,
     NotEq,
     Lt,
